name: spotify-control
description: Control Spotify playback, volume, position, shuffle, repeat, and current track from Codex on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Control Spotify playback, volume, playback modes, and current track
interface.longDescription: Use Spotify Control to play, pause, skip, inspect the current track, change volume and playback position, toggle shuffle or repeat, and control Spotify from Codex on macOS.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Spotify Control to play, pause, skip tracks, inspect what is playing, or manage Spotify playback from Codex.
